contact.title: Find us
contact.address: Promenade du 7ᵉ Art, Bay 1 shopping centre, 77200 Torcy, France
contact.access: Right next to Torcy station (RER A) — free parking at the Bay 1 shopping centre.

menu.title: Menu
menu.wip: The full menu is coming soon. Meanwhile, order takeaway.

about.title: About us
about.text: Dragonland welcomes you in Torcy, inside the Bay 1 shopping centre, with a menu spanning Teochew, Cantonese, Thai and Vietnamese cuisine. Every dish is homemade, with the generous portions the house is known for. Dine in our air-conditioned rooms or on the terrace, for lunch or dinner.
about.events: The restaurant is available for private events. Call us to arrange a date.
about.text2: From pho soups to wok-fried dishes, the menu highlights Teochew and Cantonese specialities alongside Thai flavours and Vietnamese classics. A short walk from Torcy station and the shopping centre cinema, it works just as well for a quick lunch as for a family dinner, before or after a film.
